title: Methods of Data Hiding in Text
description: A flowchart categorizing and explaining the primary techniques for concealing information within plain text.
relationships: Digital Watermarking is a type of Steganography focused on copyright protection
Linguistic Steganography uses semantic methods like mimic functions and open codes
Whitespace Steganography manipulates tabs, spaces, and line endings
Format-Based Steganography alters text characteristics like font or color
Null Ciphers hide a real message within a larger, innocent-looking text
